name: Decisions Log
description: Captain decision trail. Every meaningful decision the Captain makes — with the WHY — logged here so future Officers can apply principles, not just follow the letter. Replaces shared/interfaces/captain-decisions.md as the primary surface. The markdown file remains as a mirror for git-backup and session pre-load.

fields.name: decision_date
fields.description: The date Captain made the decision

fields.name: why
fields.description: The reasoning behind the decision — the principle future Officers should apply. REQUIRED.

fields.name: affected
fields.description: Comma-separated list of files, Linear issues, GitHub issues, or Officer roles affected by this decision

fields.name: reversibility
fields.description: Bezos framing — affects how much discussion to spawn later

fields.name: superseded_by_decision
fields.description: If this decision was later overridden, link to the newer Decisions Log record
